content.en:
"With the Time Snake Beads, I can continue to copy the Time Snake Beads, and then use the Extreme Time Extreme Dao in the Time Snake Beads to comprehend, then I can raise the Time Extreme Dao to the extreme realm!"

Ye Tian said excitedly.

Subsequently, he went into full retreat and meditation.

Time passed slowly, Ye Tian's perception of the Extreme Time Pole became deeper and deeper, and after a long time, the Time Pole Dao was finally realized by Ye Tianshen to the extreme realm.

When the Extreme Dao of Time reached the limit realm, Ye Tian suddenly felt that the heavens and the earth were different.

Rumble!!!!

The combination of the Extreme Time Pole and the Extreme Space Pole allowed Ye Tian to penetrate the Primordial Black Sea in one eye.

At this moment, he knew that he could completely stay in the original Black Sea, and it would stay forever, and he would not be excluded again.

Swish!

Ye Tian shuttled quickly in the Primordial Black Sea, and his speed was faster than before, I don't know how many times.

"I didn't expect that the combination of space-time and extreme dao in the extreme realm could make my speed so much faster, it was a earth-shaking change!" Ye Tian was shocked.

However, the changes are more than that.

Standing in the Primordial Black Sea, he could even sense the end of the Extreme Dao Realm and the Extreme Dao Deep Sea, not a preliminary induction, but the entire end of the realm and the Extreme Dao Deep Sea.

Under his perception, the Extreme Dao Deep Sea and the End of the Realm are like a whole, similar to a heaven and earth, one and the same, and also similar to a prison, and the creatures inside can hardly get out of this prison, unless they comprehend the Extreme Extreme Dao, they can get out of this prison and come to the Primordial Black Sea.

In addition, under his perception, the Primordial Black Sea contains infinite changes in time and space, and if you don't master the extreme path of time and space, shuttling here is simply a random shuttle, and you will get lost here.

Of course, even if you get lost, you can return to the end of the world, after all, he is a creature of the end of the world, and he can return at any time, which is called directly returning to the end of the world from the location location.

However, he didn't want to have anything to gain in the original Black Sea, and he didn't want to find any benefits, so he kept getting lost here.

But after comprehending the extreme space-time pole, Ye Tian will not be lost.

"That Boundless Lord must have comprehended the Extreme Space-Time Pole, and the Abyss Palace Lord should have also comprehended it, as for whether the other Extreme Realm Perfect Controllers have comprehended the Extreme Space-Time Pole Path, it's hard to say. Ye Tian guessed.

In the following days, Ye Tian continued to shuttle and patrol the Primordial Black Sea.

Suddenly, this day.

Ye Tian found that a perfect controller of the Extreme Realm of the End of the Realm had escaped from the Extreme Black Sea of the Realm, if he hadn't comprehended the Extreme Path of Time and Space and sensed the end of the entire Realm, he would not have been able to discover the other party's escape.

But now, he perceives it, but the other party doesn't perceive his existence.

After this Extreme Realm Perfect Controller escaped into the Primordial Black Sea, Ye Tian lost the perception of the other party, obviously the other party's current position was too close to him, so he couldn't perceive it.

"No, another Extreme Realm Perfect Controller has escaped into the Extreme Realm Perfect Master, how can it be so often?"

Ye Tian was surprised.

There are absolutely few perfect controllers of the Extreme Realm who have comprehended the Extreme Extreme Dao in the Ends of the Realm, and they have escaped into the Primordial Black Sea one after another, there must be something big.

But Ye Tian didn't hear anything at the end of the realm.

Wow!

Ye Tian's duplicate body locked the opponent's previous position at the end of the realm by sensing the position that the other party had escaped into.

"It's the perfect controller of the Extreme Realm of the Extreme Dao True River!"

Ye Tian confirmed the identity of the other party, and both of them were the perfect controllers of the Extreme Dao True River.

Obviously, the Extreme Way Makawa is hiding something.

However, if you only comprehend an extreme extreme path, you can't stay in the primordial black sea for a long time, so Ye Tian is waiting in the extreme path true river.

Sure enough, not long after, a Polar Realm Perfect Controller returned from the Primordial Black Sea.

"It's him, the Lord of the Northern Underworld, the fourth strongest person below the three powerhouses of the Extreme Dao True River after the Lord of the White Night, the Lord of the Golden Body, and the Lord of Destruction!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

The other Extreme Realm Perfect Controllers couldn't sense the fluctuations of the Lord of the Northern Netherworld's return, but they couldn't hide it from Ye Tian, so he accurately locked on to the Lord of the Northern Netherworld.

In the years that followed, the Lord of the White Night had returned from the Primordial Black Sea.

"They will definitely go, and when the time comes, I will lock their location through the Cause and Effect Pole Path, plus I have already sensed the Extreme Space-Time Pole Dao, and I can track them in the Primordial Black Sea!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

After all, he was too curious, there must be something big about these Extreme Realm Perfect Controllers of the Extreme Dao True River, if there was a big opportunity, he might be able to mix it up.

If it is discovered, then it will be discovered, anyway, they have no malicious intentions, and they will not embarrass themselves as cultivators at the end of the realm.

And he really wants to make a move, with his current strength, he is really not afraid!

Ye Tian waited slowly, and finally on this day, the Lord of the Northern Hell entered the Primordial Black Sea again.

Ye Tian did not hesitate at all, followed the other party's position, and also escaped into the Primordial Black Sea.

If you do not comprehend the extreme path of time and space, you will not be able to grasp this kind of space-time fluctuation at all, unless you forcibly follow the Lord of the North Hades at the same time, it is possible to keep up with the Lord of the North Hades, otherwise a little later, you will not be able to enter the place where the Lord of the North Hades is located.

But in that case, it will naturally be discovered by the Lord of the Northern Underworld.

And Ye Tian comprehended the extreme space-time pole path, so he could naturally grasp the opportunity and escape directly into the place where the Lord of the Northern Netherworld was located through this space-time fluctuation.

In this way, after he entered the Primordial Black Sea, he would be very close to the Lord of the Northern Netherworld, and he could use the Extreme Path of Cause and Effect to track the Lord of the Northern Netherworld.

Otherwise, the distance was too far, and Ye Tian would not be able to find the Lord of the Northern Underworld.

Airplanes!

Ye Tian came to the Primordial Black Sea, and used the extreme space-time pole to cover himself, almost blending into the Primordial Black Sea, which was not easy to find.

It's also cautious!

"The Lord of the Northern Underworld is gone, it seems to be gone!"

Ye Tian immediately urged the Extreme Dao of Cause and Effect in the Extreme Realm, and through the weak causal connection, he locked the position of the Lord of the Northern Netherworld.

Swish!

Ye Tian shuttled, but slowed down, after all, the speed of the Lord of the Northern Underworld was too slow in his eyes, and he could catch up almost instantly.

The Lord of the Northern Hades shuttled for a while, came to a place, and then stopped.

And Ye Tian was hidden in the distance, in this position, Ye Tian could sense the Lord of the Northern Underworld, but the Lord of the Northern Underworld could not perceive him.

At this moment, the Lord of the Northern Hades took out a token.

Soon, the space of the primordial Black Sea shook, and a space-time entrance appeared.

And at this time, Ye Tian was shocked.

He sensed another piece of heaven and earth, no less than the end of the realm, but it was not the end of the realm.

"Oh my God, the Extreme Dao True River has actually discovered a place similar to the end of the realm, and they have mastered the method of entering, no wonder they are so hidden, and they don't share it with other eternal heaven and earth!"

Ye Tian was surprised.
